requirements.title: Project-Level Wisdom System
requirements.body: Durable cross-change learnings must be persisted in a project-level JSONL store to improve agent performance across sessions.

scenarios.title: Durable learning promotion
given: A convention-level learning discovered in a change
then: The entry is appended to project-level wisdom.jsonl

requirements.title: Manifest-Driven Workflow recommendations
requirements.body: Command recommendations in adv-status must be derived from a type-safe workflow manifest to ensure consistent pathing.

scenarios.title: Context-aware recommendations
then: It recommends adv-review or adv-harden based on manifest successors

requirements.title: Adversarial Review Enforcement
requirements.body: /adv-review and /adv-harden must enforce a minimum findings threshold to prevent shallow 'LGTM' behavior.

scenarios.title: Minimum findings validation
given: A review with fewer than 3 non-nit findings
then: The gate remains open and requires explicit justification for the clean result

requirements.title: Status Config Diagnostics and Feature Flags
requirements.body: adv_status must surface project.json diagnostics and include parsed feature flag values so agents can see config health and runtime policy settings without opening files.

scenarios.title: Invalid project config is surfaced
then: Output includes a config error or warning recommendation
The command does not fail hard due to config parse issues

scenarios.title: Feature flags are visible in status output
then: Defaults are applied when flags are omitted

requirements.title: Task Metadata Filter Semantics
requirements.body: Tasks may include optional metadata key/value pairs. adv_task_list must support has_metadata_key:<key> and metadata:<key>=<value> filters with behavior aligned between JSON source-of-truth and SQLite cache indexes.

scenarios.title: Filter by metadata key
given: A change with tasks containing metadata keys
scenarios.when: adv_task_list is called with filter has_metadata_key:<key>
then: Only tasks containing that metadata key are returned

scenarios.title: Filter by metadata key/value
given: A change with tasks containing metadata key/value pairs
scenarios.when: adv_task_list is called with filter metadata:<key>=<value>
then: Only tasks matching both key and value are returned

requirements.title: Bounded Signal Flush on Shutdown
requirements.body: On SIGINT/SIGTERM, the plugin must run a bounded flush path before close, with idempotent/reentrant handling so duplicate signals cannot trigger multiple concurrent flush sequences.

scenarios.title: Signal performs bounded flush
given: The process receives SIGINT or SIGTERM
then: A hard timeout bounds flush duration

scenarios.title: Duplicate signals are idempotent
given: A shutdown flush is already in progress

requirements.title: Durable Proposal Context for adv-task
requirements.body: After Quick Contract confirmation, /adv-task must always persist contract context to proposal.md, and downstream workflows must tolerate missing/empty legacy proposal files via scaffold fallback warnings.

scenarios.title: adv-task writes proposal by default
given: A Quick Contract is confirmed in /adv-task
then: proposal.md is written in the change directory
The file includes intent, scope, and success criteria

scenarios.title: Legacy missing proposal is non-blocking
given: A legacy change has missing or empty proposal.md
